title: ruehssia mayana
intro: Ruehssia mayana, also known as Wild Indigo, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ruehssia mayana include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Ruehssia mayana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for topical and internal use, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", ruehssia mayana benefits include exhibiting significant anti-Staphylococcus aureus activity with some extracts showing bactericidal effects on S. aureus strains and inhibiting biofilm-formation.
